raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current footing","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, Toby?","description":"Lets Toby set context on what is working before the conversation turns to growth gaps.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible stretch","name":"Where are you choosing to be more visible in design decisions right now?","description":"Surfaces whether he is intentionally stepping into visible strategic positions or staying in safer execution lanes.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next role picture","name":"What kind of design work would make the next step feel real for you?","description":"Forces a concrete picture of the scope and outcomes that would signal the next level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Judgment target","name":"Where do you want your judgment to carry more weight?","description":"Elicits the specific decisions or tradeoffs he wants to own at the next level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision ownership","name":"What decisions are you already making that should be explicitly yours?","description":"Identifies where he is acting at the next level without yet owning the authority or framing.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team proof","name":"Where have you changed another team's plan or decision through your design leadership?","description":"Looks for concrete examples of org-level influence rather than internal execution alone.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sponsorship shape","name":"What kind of sponsorship would actually move the needle for you here?","description":"Surfaces the specific air cover, introductions, or backing he needs instead of generic support.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff choice","name":"What would you be willing to trade off to make more room for strategic influence?","description":"Forces a real prioritisation conversation about what gets dropped to create headspace for leadership work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"First move","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to do before we next meet?","description":"Closes on a specific commitment that turns the growth conversation into an action plan.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
